programme.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Leeds Utd
programme.desc: In the dying embers of an 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship clash at Villa Park, Kemar Roofe's last-gasp goal sealed a famous Leeds comeback having trailed 2-0 to Aston Villa.

programme.desc: In 2019 at Villa Park, Tyrone Mings, Tammy Abraham and Andre Green saved Villa's blushes, scoring three goals in the final 10 minutes to steal a point from the visiting Sheffield United.

programme.desc: Frank Lampard's Derby go to Elland Road for the second leg of their 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship play-off semi-final with Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds, with the odds stacked against them.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Charlton v Doncaster

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Coventry City v Fulham
programme.desc: In October 2021, Coventry took Fulham to the sword, putting four past the travelling west Londoners who eventually went on to secure Premier League promotion.

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Blackburn v Fulham
programme.desc: In a Sky Bet Championship encounter to remember for the visitors - and one to forget for the hosts - the travelling Fulham put seven unanswered goals past a hapless Blackburn at Ewood Park.

programme.desc: Liverpool v Chelsea (Kick-off 12.30pm). Coverage of the top-flight match from Anfield. The reverse fixture back in October saw Brazilian youngster Estevao score a 96th-minute winner for the Blues to earn them a 2-1 victory over Arne Slot's side. Moises Caicedo opened the scoring after 14 minutes before Cody Gakpo replied for Liverpool, only for Estevao to score with virutally the last kick of the game to earn Chelsea the victory.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Manchester City v QPR on the final day of the 2011/12 season will forever be remembered as the most dramatic of finales to a Premier League season. programme.desc: With nearly 500 Premier League games to his name, and tenth all time in goals scored, Jermain Defoe has left an indelible mark on the Premier League. PL Moments sits down with the former West Ham, Spurs, Portsmouth, Sunderland and Bournemouth striker to look back at the goals and the games that defined his career. Defoe reflects on his childhood, road to the Premier League, his international career as well as his work off the pitch.

programme.desc: The Tradition is an event on the PGA Tour Champions. First staged 36 years ago in 1989, the PGA Tour recognizes the event as one of the five senior major golf championships. It is the only senior major where the winner does not earn an exemption into a PGA Tour or European Tour event.

programme.desc: Liverpool v Bournemouth Anfield sets the stage for the 2025-26 Premier League curtain raiser as the reigning champions Liverpool get their title defence underway against Andoni Iraola's Bournemouth.
programme.title: Friday Night Football

programme.desc: West Ham United v Chelsea Left wanting on opening weekend, West Ham and Chelsea target Premier League lift off on Friday Night Football. The Irons lost 3-0 at Sunderland, while Chelsea were held by Palace.
programme.title: Friday Night Football

programme.desc: Arsenal v Leeds United Having claimed a win at Old Trafford last week, Arsenal host Leeds on Saturday Night Football. The newly promoted side kicked off their campaign with a 1-0 win over Everton.
programme.title: Saturday Night Football

programme.desc: Newcastle United v Liverpool On Monday Night Football, the transfer saga of the summer plays second fiddle as Newcastle and Liverpool enter a raucous St James' Park atmosphere for a Premier League clash.
programme.title: Monday Night Football

programme.desc: E234 — Manchester United v Burnley Manchester United's search for a first top-flight win of the campaign continues with the Clarets' visit. New boys Burnley got off the mark with a crucial 2-0 win over Sunderland.
programme.title: Premier League

programme.desc: E248 — Manchester City v Manchester United An intriguing Manchester derby sees Pep Guardiola's out-of-sorts City host Ruben Amorim's all-at-sea United, who steadied the ship before the break with a nervy win over Burnley.
programme.title: Premier League

programme.desc: E261 — Arsenal v Manchester City Hot off last week's derby win, Pep Guardiola's City travel to London for a Super Sunday contest against Arsenal. The Gunners return to the Emirates after a 2-0 win in Bilbao midweek.
programme.title: Premier League

programme.desc: E265 — Crystal Palace v Liverpool With a trip to Istanbul ahead, Arne Slot's Liverpool venture to Selhurst Park first for a Premier League clash with Oliver Glasner's rock-solid Palace - now 17 games unbeaten.
programme.title: Premier League

programme.desc: S5 E49 — Harry Kewell We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray.
programme.title: Premier League Stories

programme.desc: 2005/06 A look at memorable moments from the 2005/2006 season. Chelsea were out to secure back-to-back league titles.

programme.title: Prem Classics

programme.desc: 1996: Tottenham Hotspur v Manchester United A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 1996 and a memorable match between Tottenham and Manchester United at White Hart Lane.
programme.title: The Premier League's Greatest Games

programme.desc: 2017: Tottenham Hotspur v Manchester United A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, a look back to 2017 and a clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United in Spurs' final game at White Hart Lane.
programme.title: The Premier League's Greatest Games

programme.desc: 2009: Manchester United v Tottenham Hotspur A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, a look back to 2009 and a seven-goal thriller between Manchester United and Spurs at Old Trafford.
programme.title: The Premier League's Greatest Games

programme.desc: 1999: Manchester United v Tottenham Hotspur Classic action from the Premier League.
programme.title: The Premier League's Greatest Games

programme.desc: 1992/93 Sky Sports has a look at some of the best goals from Premier League seasons in years gone by. Here, some of the best goals from the Premier League's first season - the 92-93 campaign.
programme.title: Best Premier League Goals

programme.desc: Tottenham Hotspur v Chelsea A chance to look back at some of the best goals from previous Premier League meetings between Tottenham and Chelsea.
programme.title: Best Premier League Goals

programme.desc: Best PL Goals: Merseyside Derby A look back at some of the best goals scored in seasons gone by in the Premier League. Here, a Merseyside derby special with all the best goals in matches between Liverpool and Everton.
programme.title: Premier League Archive

programme.desc: 1996: Newcastle United v Manchester United A look at the greatest Premier League game for each club, as voted for by fans. Here, for Newcastle United, the 5-0 destruction of Manchester United back in October 1996.
programme.title: The Premier League's Greatest Games

programme.desc: 2015: Manchester United v Norwich City Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Norwich City, the 2-1 win over Manchester United in December 2015.
programme.title: Premier League Fan's Vote

programme.desc: 1993: Oldham Athletic v Southampton Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Oldham Athletic, the 4-3 win over Southampton in 1993 that secured the Latics' survival.
programme.title: Premier League Fan's Vote

programme.desc: 2005: Portsmouth v Southampton Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Portsmouth, the 4-1 win over local rivals Southampton back in April 2005.
programme.title: The Premier League's Greatest Games

programme.desc: Teddy Sheringham A profile of former Tottenham and Manchester United striker Teddy Sheringham. The former England international was part of the Red Devils' treble-winning season in 1999.
programme.title: Premier League Legends

programme.desc: David Ginola A profile of former Newcastle United and Tottenham midfielder David Ginola. Capped 17 times for France, Ginola was famed for his Gallic flair and silky skills.
programme.title: Premier League Legends

programme.desc: Fernando Torres A look back at some of the iconic stars to have graced the Premier League. Here, remember former Liverpool and Chelsea forward Fernando Torres - a prolific goalscorer at his peak.
programme.title: Premier League Icons

programme.desc: Gareth Bale A look back at some of the most iconic players to have graced the Premier League. Here, the focus is on former Southampton and Tottenham winger Gareth Bale.
programme.title: Premier League Icons
